raw_text: I have been homeless for 8 months.  Cannot get anything to work, I have come up with failsafe solutions, but cannot get anyone to answer their phones, no response to text messages, the only person that has helped is my mother.  No strong stable money source, living the hotel life, and having difficulty finding a job despite several applications, without having an address, it is next to impossible to get a bank account or a job.  I need housing, I am willing and able to work full-time, i just need some startup help with expenses for getting into a place, getting a jib and forming stability in my life. I became homeless from a series of lies, and being cheated on by my significant other for 7 years, then kicked out and replaced by another woman, leaving me in a bad situation.  I dont have my wallet which was stolen while homeless and hence no id.
